ItacPersonItem.Notes: Grandi was a man of letters and was admitetd in the Accademia dei Ricovrati in 1601. As thank-you letter, he sent a `canzone` in praise of Niccolo` Contarini, which was read aloud in the Accademia.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
